task_completion.description: Google Earth Pro application is launched
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Google Earth Pro application window is open and visible on the desktop.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Grand Canyon area
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar shows 'Grand Canyon' or coordinates near 36.054, -112.140, or the map view clearly displays the Grand Canyon region.

task_completion.description: The 'Enter Flight Simulator' dialog is opened
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box titled 'Enter Flight Simulator' is visible, displaying aircraft options (F-16 or SR22).
The interface changes from the standard map view to a flight perspective (cockpit view or HUD overlay).

task_completion.description: Cockpit instruments or HUD are visible
task_completion.visual_evidence: Green HUD text overlays (speed, altitude, heading) or physical cockpit dashboard dials are visible on screen.

task_completion.description: Aircraft is flying over Grand Canyon terrain
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D terrain visible through the windshield or HUD shows distinctive Grand Canyon features (red rock cliffs, deep gorges, river).

task_completion.description: Screenshot saved to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save file dialog is visible with the filename 'grand_canyon_flight.png' or a file manager window shows the file saved in '/home/ga/'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Google Earth GUI to generate the view
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of using terminal commands (like wget, curl) or scripts to download or generate the image file directly.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Google Earth Pro software
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface (menus, 3D rendering, toolbars) matches the genuine Google Earth Pro software, not a static image or video player.

integrity.description: Agent did not open a pre-existing image
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is not seen opening an image viewer or web browser to display a generic photo of the Grand Canyon.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target location: Grand Canyon (approx 36.054°N, 112.140°W). Valid aircraft options: F-16 Fighting Falcon or Cirrus SR22. The flight simulator view typically includes a green Head-Up Display (HUD) or a cockpit dashboard.
